svg.text: One poster: folder hierarchy, harness control plane, multi-agent roles, benchmark pipeline, and evidence guardrails
ImageGen-inspired styling; exact labels rendered in SVG
How every fresh coding session is scoped, constrained, checked, and handed off
Project subagents and skills keep review context small
The benchmark pipeline runs below the harness; raw evidence stays protected
docs sync, log discipline, artifact immutability, privacy, stale text, report freshness, diff, tests
raw/summary immutable; rescoring writes sidecars; docs log every change
Memory is not magic; make the repo remember.
Presentation line: I do not just prompt Codex; I built a repo-native operating system that scopes agents, protects evidence, and makes each session recoverable.
